hooks.command: PROJ="/var/www/projects/saas/clipmark"; CUR=$(jq -r '.version' "$PROJ/package.json"); MA=$(echo $CUR | cut -d. -f1); MI=$(echo $CUR | cut -d. -f2); PA=$(echo $CUR | cut -d. -f3); NEW="$MA.$MI.$((PA+1))"; jq --arg v "$NEW" '.version = $v' "$PROJ/package.json" > /tmp/_clipmark_pkg.json && mv /tmp/_clipmark_pkg.json "$PROJ/package.json"; sed -i "s/v${CUR}/v${NEW}/g" "$PROJ/app.html"; DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); sed -i "s|## \[${CUR}\].*|## [${NEW}] - ${DATE}|" "$PROJ/CHANGELOG.md"; git -C "$PROJ" add "$PROJ/package.json" "$PROJ/app.html" "$PROJ/CHANGELOG.md"; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Version bumped $CUR → $NEW\"}"
